name: DoIP_SetGatewayLogicalAddress
title: DoIP_SetGatewayLogicalAddress
description: Sets the logical address of the gateway that responds to a vehicle announcement request.

parameters.name: logicalAddress
parameters.description: 0: there is no gateway or gateway’s and target’s logical address are identical 1..65535: the gateway has the given logical address other: reserved

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
